# Use of Generative AI

This project does not allow contributions generated by large languages models (LLMs) and chatbots. This ban includes tools like ChatGPT, Claude, Copilot, etc.

We are taking these steps as precaution due to the potential negative influence of AI generated content on quality, as well as likely copyright violations.

This ban of AI generated content applies to all parts of the project, including, but not limited to, code, documentation, issues, design, and artworks. An exception applies for translating texts for issues and comments to English.

AI tools can be used to answer questions and find information. However, we encourage contributors to avoid them, since AI generated information is frequently misleading or false, we cannot supply support on anything referencing AI output.
